title: diplazium velaminosum
intro: Diplazium velaminosum, also known as the Velvet-leaved Diplazium or Velvet-leaved Cinnamon Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Diplazium velaminosum is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its leaves can be dried and used in tea or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
